cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. This is HDFC Bank. My name is Rohan. I'm calling regarding your car loan application.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes. Lovejit Singh speaking. What's the update, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I'm happy to inform you that your loan has been approved. We just need to coordinate with the dealership for the disbursement.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, that's great news. Which dealership are we talking about? I was dealing with Mahindra First Choice.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir. We have all the details. I'll just need to confirm a few things with you before we proceed.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 36s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A bank agent calls a customer who applied for a car loan to inform them that their loan has been approved and to coordinate the disbursement process with the car dealership.
